title: Motion to suppress
doc_html:
Art. 872.  Motion to suppress

The child may move to suppress evidence obtained in violation of the Constitution of the United States or the Constitution of Louisiana.

Acts 1991, No. 235, §8, eff. Jan. 1, 1992.
